Patch Set 1: Verified-1 Code-Review-1

Sparky be and data router stopped starting this change. I deployed without this change and all the containers came up. Could be the new images for sparky and data router tagged might not be the latest STAGING-latest

Patch Set 1: -Verified -Code-Review

It seems that its only data router that is the issue. Sparky comes back after a few restarts.
Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
